session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

acq_time.Description: Acquisition time for the session rounded to the nearest hour and half-month period for anonymization

0_back_all_correct.Description: All correct responses in 0-back (true positives + true negatives)

0_back_all_incorrect.Description: All incorrect responses in 0-back (false positives + false negatives)

2_back_all_correct.Description: All correct responses in 2-back (true positives + true negatives)

2_back_all_incorrect.Description: All incorrect responses in 2-back (false positives + false negatives)

all_back_all_correct.Description: All correct responses in 0- and 2-back (true positives + true negatives)

all_back_all_incorrect.Description: All incorrect responses in 0- and 2-back (false positives + false negatives)

0_back_false_alarm_rate.Description: False alarm rate in 0-back (false positives / foils)

2_back_false_alarm_rate.Description: False alarm rate in 2-back (false positives / foils)

all_back_hit_rate.Description: Hit rate in 0- and 2-back (true positives / targets)

all_back_false_alarm_rate.Description: False alarm rate in 0- and 2-back (false positives / foils)

all_back_dprime.Description: d' sensitivity index for 0- and 2-back (Z(H) - Z(FA))
